name: Figural Bunny Floral Quilted with Printed Pillow - Threshold™ Design with Studio McGee
description:
Gift yourself or a loved one a cute, cuddly companion for Easter with the Figural Bunny Floral Quilted with Printed Pillow from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This figural pillow is designed in the shape of a bunny covered with floral and bunny print for a cute look. Made of cotton-linen blend fabric, this quilted pillow feels soft and is finished with a sewn seam closure.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
